creator: jrm@freebsd.org
text:
devel/rubygem-actionview50, mail/rubygem-actionmailer50, and www/rubygem-actionpack50 currently depend on textproc/rubygem-rails-dom-testing, which in turn depends on devel/rubygem-activesupport4.  Could each of these be updated to instead depend on textproc/rubygem-rails-dom-testing-rails50?

devel/rubygem-activejob50 currently depends on databases/rubygem-globalid, which in turn depends on rubygem-activesupport4.  Could devel/rubygem-activejob50 be updated to instead depend on databases/rubygem-globalid-rails50?
